title: Colorimetric ADP Assay Protocol
author: Kiichi Hirota
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.zk4f4yw

steps.title: Reconstitute the ADP standard (1 µmol)...
steps.instruction: Reconstitute the ADP standard (1 µmol) in 100 µl of water to generate a 10 mM ADP stock solution.

steps.title: Dilute 10 µl of the 10...
steps.instruction: Dilute 10 µl of the 10 mM ADP stock solution with 90 µl of ADP Assay Buffer to prepare a 1 mM ADP standard solution.

steps.title: Prepare dilutions of a ADP standard...
steps.instruction: Prepare dilutions of a ADP standard using ADP Assay Buffer (0, 0.04, 0.08, 0.12, 0.16, 0.2 mM). 100 µl of each dilution is required to set up duplicate reading (2 x 50 µl).

steps.title: Remove media and wash cells with cold PBS
steps.instruction: Remove media and wash cells with cold PBS.

steps.title: Lyse cells in 100 µl of ADP Assay Buffer
steps.instruction: Lyse cells in 100 µl of ADP Assay Buffer.

steps.title: Incubate the lysate for 10 min on ice
steps.instruction: Incubate the lysate for 10 min on ice.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 18,000 x g for 5 minutes at 4°C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 18,000 x g for 5 minutes at 4°C.

steps.title: Collect the supernatant in a new...
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant in a new microcentrifuge tube and keep on ice.

steps.title: Prepare 50 µl of Reaction Mix for each reaction
steps.instruction: Prepare 50 µl of Reaction Mix for each reaction. Prepare an amount of Reaction Mix sufficient for all samples including ADP standards. %s %s

steps.title: Add 50 µl of ADP standards...
steps.instruction: Add 50 µl of ADP standards or samples per well to a clear 96-well plate.

steps.title: Add 50 µl of Reaction Mix to each well
steps.instruction: Add 50 µl of Reaction Mix to each well.

steps.title: Incubate for 30 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Incubate for 30 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Measure the absorbance at 750 nm...
steps.instruction: Measure the absorbance at 750 nm using iMark™ Microplate Absorbance Reader.

steps.title: Test all samples with a minimum of two replicates
steps.instruction: Test all samples with a minimum of two replicates.

steps.title: Dilute the lysate 3-fold in ADP Assay Buffer
steps.instruction: Dilute the lysate 3-fold in ADP Assay Buffer.
